Proposal
Reliance Hospitals currently using On Premise SAP software to manage their business & now want to shift to the Zoho Platform & implement their entire business processes like sales & marketing to provide a better and more engaging experience to the existing & new customers They have identified Zoho CRM Plus as one of the platforms to digitize and optimize these processes.
Scope of work
 Zoho CRM

1. Standard Configuration
  1.1 Company Creation
  1.2 Hierarchy Configuration
  1.3 Currency Configuration
  1.4 Timezone Configuration
  1.5 Holiday List
  1.6 Calender Setting-up 
  1.7 Email Authentication

2. User Configuration
   2.1 Roles Creation
   2.2 Profiles Creation
   2.3 Profiles Permission
   2.4 User Creation
   2.5 Territory Creation

3. Module Customization
  3.1 Lead Module Customization
  3.2 Contact Module Customization
  3.3 Accounts Module Customization
  3.4 Opportunity Module Customization & Pipeline Customization
  3.5 Activities Module Customization 
  3.6 Partners (Accounts & Contacts)
  3.6 Additional Custom Modules (up to 5 Modules)
  3.7 Customer 360 Degree

4. Workflow Automation
  4.1 Lead Generation Via Automation
  4.2 Lead Conversion via Automation
  4.3 Other Workflow Automation (Up to 7)
  4.4 Lead Assignment.

5. Reports & Dashboards 
  5.1 Standard Home Page Customization
  5.2 Standard Reports Customization
  5.3 Standard Dashboard Customization
  5.4 Custom Reports &  Dashboard (up to 10)


Zoho SalesiQ
1.1 Sales IQ Standard configuration
1.2 Company set up
1.3 User Set up
1.4 2 Targeting and routing rules set up
             1.5 1 Chatbot setup - Up to 20 decision trees
1.6 Standard reports set up 
1.7 Visitor tracking setup
1.8 Integration with Zoho CRM & Campaigns 


Zoho Campaigns 
 1.1 Standard User configuration
 1.2 List Templates (up to 5)
 1.3 Email Templates (Upto 5)
 1.4 Workflow Creation (up to 5)
 1.5 Campaigns Wise Standard Reports 
 1.6 2 Nurturing Journeys 
 1.7 1 A/B Testing Campaign


Zoho Social 
1.1 Social set-up for (upto 1 brand)
1.2 Facebook, Instagram, & Google Ads
1.3 Integration with Zoho CRM & Campaigns 





Integration

1.1 What's app (Haptik) 
1.2 Telephony Integration with Zoho CRM
1.3 Landing Page Integration (Up to 2 Pages)
1.4 Web to Lead Integration (Up to 2 Forms)
1.6 On Premise SAP Integration with Zoho CRM
1.7 Hospital Information System Integration with Zoho CRM


Provide following Go Live Support:
 1.1 User Training
 1.2 Custom user guide.
 1.3 30 Days Hyper- care



Assumptions:





Project Team















Project Governance & Checkpoints




Commercials:
Software Implementation:

Note: 
Above pricing exclusive of GST
Zoho License cost is not included in this proposal.
Third-party software License cost not included in this proposal (Reliance Hospitals team need to purchase from third-party service provider)
Retainer plan post hyper care for enhancement/maintenance.
Training includes User training only, we do not provide admin training.
If travel, food, and lodging are required, it will be charged separately after written approval from the client.


Payment Terms
Zoho License cost need to be paid full upfront to Zoho in advance
60% Implementation Cost Payable in advance
40% Implementation Cost Payable on Go Live
For Time & Material consumption, actual hours consumption will be tracked via Zoho Projects.
Retainer services will be billed quarterly in advance.

Timeline:  
Post we received PO from the Reliance Hospitals project and will get started within 15 days.
Entire project will take 12 Weeks + 2 Weeks Buffer

Constraints
Actual delivery date may change on the basis of the timely response of various stakeholders.
All third-party Integration will depend on the technical capabilities & API support of those platforms. 
Implementation will depend on the Zoho platform's current capability & limitations.

Proposal:
Solid Plus 3D Tech INC currently using Zoho applications to manage their business, is now looking for Zoho CRM, Reseller portal, Customer portal & Zoho Analytics Implementation that need to be done to streamline their entire business processes like sales, customer service management processes 
Scope of work
Zoho CRM

Zoho Analytics

Data Migration, UAT & Go-Live Support

Project Team

Project Governance & Checkpoints

Project Plan:




Note - This is a tentative project plan, a detailed Plan will be shared after requirement gathering.

Escalation Process 
However, from time to time, there might be project issues/dependencies 
That can impact progress and result in an overall impact on timelines with 
a Cascaded impact on effort and project costs, if not addressed on time.

While the project team will attempt to resolve such issues amicably and in a timely
manner, the escalation path below provides a mechanism for the stakeholders both Invest India and Fristine to intervene, resolve issues, and attempt 
To bring the project back on track.





Note: Fristine Infotech Business-day timings are defined as 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM,
Monday to Friday, excluding public holidays

Constraints & Limitations
The actual delivery date may change based on the timely response of various stakeholders.
All third-party Integrations will depend on the technical capabilities & API support of those platforms. 
Implementation will depend on the Zoho platform's current capability & limitations.
All Zoho Plans have limits in Records, Storage (both data & file), Custom functions, and API calls. If limits are exceeded during data migration or usage, the Solid Plus 3D team will need to purchase additional add-ons to the Zoho plan as & if required.
The above scope is basis initial understanding and inputs from the client. Final scope may evolve over time as we discover requirements details.
No integrations considered in above scope apart from native CRM webform embedment and email functionality. If any other required, the efforts have to be considered separately.
Accurate masters, information and formats expected from clients for fields, templates and layout changes. for initial Data migration uploads, data is expected in Zoho specific formats from the client team. FI team will not be responsible for data cleanliness, will only assist with required data templates and uploads
We have estimated certain efforts for Data migration as per the requirement discussions. Efforts above certain estimates to be considered on Time and material basis in managed services
We have considered a certain number of components for Reports and Dashboards, forms and similar factors. Any development above the mentioned limits will be considered in managed services. Additional clarity on type of reports, dashboards and views, related lists might affect the scope and estimates.
Client IT team to embed webforms, Zoho CRM APIs will be exposed.
Any financial reconciliation and calculations in the system or from other systems are the responsibility of the client team. It will be the responsibility of users that data is fed incorrectly.
The process flow and calculation logics has to be provided by the client team. The Process flow will be designed based on our preliminary understandings during pre-sales process, the solution architecture may change after we have a detailed requirement gathering for BRD & FSD.
No ADL data lake or any other DMS integration considered in the scope. Additional Data storage, File storage, data imports and exports, data back ups, data enrichments, API credits, Functions credits,Automated action calls, Webhook calls, Mail merge credits, Webform analytics, notification email credits will be purchased separately directly from Zoho as per business requirement. Set up cost will be considered separately.
Purchase of any 3rd party services to be considered separately, out of current scope. Maintenance efforts required for future maintenance of connections will be considered separately under managed / Support services.     
                           
Commercials:
Software Implementation:

Note: 
Above pricing exclusive of GST
Third-party software License cost not included in this proposal Solid Plus 3D team need to purchase separately. 
Retainer plan post-hyper care for enhancement/maintenance.
Client agrees to provide timely sign offs with a grace period of 7 days not with standing and client-side delays. The invoice needs to be paid as per the PO terms agreed and not partially. 
Training includes User training only, we do not provide admin training.
In case of on-site visits travel, food, and lodging are required, it will be charged separately after written approval from the client.
The cap of the workflow Automation, Templates etc will be done subject to use-case, the maximum cap for the same is 10. If the business use case is achieved in Less than 10 limits, the work shall be marked as completed and relevant payment will be released 

Payment Terms
Zoho License cost needs to be paid in full upfront to Zoho in advance
40% Implementation Cost Payable in advance
60% Implementation Cost Payable on UAT Sign-Off
For Time & Material consumption, actual hours consumption will be tracked via Zoho Projects.
Retainer services will be billed quarterly in advance.



Timeline:  
Resource Mobilization Period: 2 Weeks after Duly signed PO is received from the Client.
The entire project will take 10 Weeks plus 2 Weeks buffer.
